heading: Regulations by President
label: 9 Regulations by President
text: The President may prescribe such regulations as he may think fit for carrying into effect the various provisions of any act relating to Indian affairs, and for the settlement of the accounts of Indian affairs.
notes: CodificationR.S. § 465 derived from , .act June 30, 1834, ch. 162, § 174 Stat. 738
